footer.company: KHTAIN Block Technology Ltd · FrontierX Protocol

hero.badge: Full lifecycle contracts passing · Docker Web 9830 · RPC 9831
hero.title: FrontierX Protocol
hero.description: A premium Web3 command center where NFT access, FRX staking rewards, token utility, and AI agents meet in one full-stack protocol demo.
hero.loopTitle: A compact Web3 economy that is readable, testable, and playable.

flow.mintBody: Claim one of 100 Frontier Access Pass NFTs.
flow.stakeBody: Lock the pass to generate FRX rewards by rarity.
flow.arenaBody: Use FRX for lottery rounds and Crystal Forge.
flow.aiBody: Burn FRX to unlock token-gated AI utilities.

hero.dualTokenBody: Mint a Frontier Access Pass, stake it to earn FRX, then use FRX for lottery entries, Crystal Forge plays, and AI agent calls.
hero.aiUtilityBody: AI agents verify on-chain FRX burns before returning reports, content, and knowledge distillation results through Vercel APIs.
hero.deflationBody: Crystal Forge requests lock FRX first, settle later with fixed request-block entropy, and refund if the settlement window expires.

mint.title: Mint Your Protocol Key
mint.description: Mint a limited Frontier Access Pass, verify NFT-gated access, and prepare for staking, games, and token-powered AI utilities.
mint.cardBody: A limited access credential for staking rewards, game entry, and AI agent utility.

gate.connectDescription: Your wallet will be checked for either a held Frontier Pass or a staked pass.
gate.notConfiguredTitle: NFT gate is not fully configured
gate.notConfiguredDescription: Set both FrontierPass and FRXStaking addresses for the current chain so staked passes can count as access.
gate.loadingDescription: Reading wallet and staking state from the active chain.
gate.deniedDescription: You need a Frontier Access Pass in your wallet or staked in the protocol to unlock this section.
gate.welcomeBody: This content is visible because your wallet has effective pass access. Staked passes count too, so users do not lose access while earning FRX.

arena.title: Arena
arena.description: NFT-gated game surfaces powered by FRX. Staked Frontier Pass holders remain eligible because the gate reads `FRXStaking.effectivePassHolder()`.
arena.access: Access verified. Lottery entry uses FRX approval followed by transfer into the pool.

lottery.title: Daily Lottery

1.title: Approve FRX
1.body: Click Approve FRX and confirm in MetaMask. This lets the lottery contract pull your entry amount.

2.title: Enter lottery
2.body: Click Enter lottery (default 10 FRX). After the transaction confirms, Current Pool and Entries will update. Approve alone does not enter the round.

lottery.tips: Need at least 10 FRX in your wallet. Claim staking rewards on /stake first if your balance is low. Use Sepolia in MetaMask and in the site network menu.

forge.title: Crystal Forge

1.title: Approve FRX
1.body: Click Approve FRX and confirm in MetaMask (5 FRX allowance for one forge).

2.title: Forge crystal
2.body: Click Forge crystal and confirm. 5 FRX moves into the forge contract and creates a pending request.

3.title: Wait one block
3.body: Settlement unlocks in the next Sepolia block (usually under a minute). The Settle button stays disabled until the chain advances.

4.title: Settle forge
4.body: Click Settle forge and confirm. You receive SHATTER, GLOW, BLAZE, or SUPERNOVA with the matching payout. Then you can start another round from step 1.

forge.tips: Each full round is Approve → Forge → wait → Settle. Do not click only Approve and expect a result. Need 5+ FRX per forge.

ai.title: AI Agent Hub
ai.description: Burn $FRX to unlock token-gated AI workflows. Each request is verified on-chain and signed by your wallet before the backend calls the model provider.
ai.verifiedTitle: Choose an AI agent and pay with burned $FRX.
ai.verifiedBody: The burn transaction, request payload, nonce, and wallet signature are sent together so the backend can reject copied receipts and expired requests.
ai.emptyResult: The AI-generated markdown report will appear here after the burn transaction confirms and the signed request passes backend verification.
ai.privacy: Do not paste private keys, seed phrases, confidential customer data, or sensitive documents. AI prompts are sent to the configured model provider after burn verification.
ai.confirmBody: This will burn {{cost}} $FRX from your wallet. After the burn confirms, you will sign a request proving this AI call belongs to your wallet.

scout.title: AI Search Visibility Scout
scout.description: Analyze how a brand may appear in AI search engines and get optimization priorities.
scout.label: Business name or website URL

content.title: Smart Content Forge
content.description: Turn a topic into platform-native content for LinkedIn, X, WeChat, or Xiaohongshu.
content.label: Topic or key message
content.help: Keep this specific for a better platform-native result.
content.platformHelp: The system prompt changes for each platform's writing style.

distill.title: Knowledge Distiller
distill.description: Distill long notes, docs, or articles into a structured markdown knowledge card.
distill.label: Source text
distill.help: Paste up to 8,000 characters of notes, docs, or article text.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Public chain telemetry for FrontierX. Token economics, pass supply, game state, and recent protocol activity refresh every 30 seconds.
dashboard.rpcError: Dashboard data could not be refreshed from the active RPC. Try again in a moment or switch networks.
dashboard.notConfigured: Dashboard not configured for this chain

network.localSepoliaHint: You are on Local Hardhat. Sepolia deployments are not visible here — switch MetaMask and the network menu to Sepolia.
network.wrongChainHint: You are on {{chain}}. Switch MetaMask and the network menu to Sepolia to test the live deployment.
